Description: Verify homepage loads within acceptable time
Test_Steps: 1. Open https://cropsly.com 2. Wait for page to load 3. Verify all elements visible
Expected_Result: Page should load in <3 seconds with all content visible

Description: Verify all navigation menu items are clickable and functional
Test_Steps: 1. Click on Services menu 2. Click on Portfolio 3. Click on About 4. Click on Contact
Expected_Result: All menu items should navigate to correct pages

Description: Verify hero section CTA button is clickable and functional
Test_Steps: 1. Locate hero section 2. Click Get Started/CTA button 3. Verify page navigation or form appears
Expected_Result: CTA button should navigate to contact form or services page

Description: Verify clicking logo returns to homepage
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate to any inner page 2. Click logo 3. Verify homepage loads
Expected_Result: Should return to homepage

Description: Verify search feature works if available
Test_Steps: 1. Locate search box 2. Enter search term 3. Verify search results display
Expected_Result: Search results should display relevant pages

Description: Verify services page loads with all service categories
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate to Services page 2. Wait for content to load 3. Verify all service cards visible
Expected_Result: All service categories should display with descriptions

Description: Verify Mobile App Development service details display
Test_Steps: 1. Locate Mobile App Dev section 2. Read description 3. Verify technologies listed
Expected_Result: Service description and tech stack should be visible

Description: Verify Web Development service details display
Test_Steps: 1. Locate Web Dev section 2. Read description 3. Verify tech stack
Expected_Result: Service details with React NextJS NodeJS should display

Description: Verify AI Solutions service details display
Test_Steps: 1. Locate AI Services section 2. Read AI capabilities 3. Verify integrations listed
Expected_Result: AI service details with GPT Claude integration should display

Description: Verify SaaS Rescue service details display
Test_Steps: 1. Locate SaaS Rescue section 2. Read benefits 3. Verify features
Expected_Result: SaaS Rescue details should display with process steps

Description: Verify clicking service card navigates to details page
Test_Steps: 1. Click on any service card 2. Wait for navigation 3. Verify details page loads
Expected_Result: Should navigate to detailed service page with more information

Description: Verify case studies section displays all projects
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate to Portfolio/Case Studies 2. Wait for content load 3. Verify project cards visible
Expected_Result: All case study cards should display with project names and images

Description: Verify case study cards contain required information
Test_Steps: 1. Look at case study card 2. Verify client name visible 3. Verify project description
Expected_Result: Cards should show client name industry and brief description

Description: Verify clicking case study opens detail modal or page
Test_Steps: 1. Click on case study card 2. Wait for detail to load 3. Verify full case study content
Expected_Result: Case study details should display with full description screenshots and results

Description: Verify case study images load and are viewable
Test_Steps: 1. Open case study 2. Click on images 3. Verify gallery functionality
Expected_Result: Images should load without errors and gallery should work

Description: Verify case study filtering by category
Test_Steps: 1. Locate filter/category options 2. Click on category 3. Verify filtered results
Expected_Result: Should display only case studies matching selected category

Description: Verify contact form is visible and accessible
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate to Contact page 2. Scroll to contact form 3. Verify form fields visible
Expected_Result: Contact form with all fields should be visible and accessible

Description: Verify name field validation
Test_Steps: 1. Leave name field empty 2. Try to submit 3. Verify error message displays
Expected_Result: Should show validation error for empty name field

Description: Verify email field validation with invalid format
Test_Steps: 1. Enter invalid email 2. Try to submit 3. Verify error message
Expected_Result: Should show validation error for invalid email format

Description: Verify phone field validation
Test_Steps: 1. Enter invalid phone 2. Try to submit 3. Verify error message
Expected_Result: Should show validation error for invalid phone format

Description: Verify message field validation
Test_Steps: 1. Leave message empty 2. Try to submit 3. Verify error message
Expected_Result: Should show validation error for empty message

Description: Verify successful form submission with valid data
Test_Steps: 1. Fill all fields with valid data 2. Click Submit 3. Verify success message
Expected_Result: Should display success confirmation message

Description: Verify success message displays after submission
Test_Steps: 1. Submit valid form 2. Wait for response 3. Verify success message text
Expected_Result: Success message should display and form should reset
Notes: Message: Thank you for your inquiry

Description: Verify form handles submission errors gracefully
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt submission with network error 2. Verify error message 3. Verify form data persists
Expected_Result: Should show error message and keep form data intact

Description: Verify newsletter signup form on homepage
Test_Steps: 1. Scroll to newsletter section 2. Enter email 3. Click subscribe
Expected_Result: Should accept email and show success message

Description: Verify newsletter form validates email
Test_Steps: 1. Enter invalid email 2. Try to submit 3. Verify error
Expected_Result: Should show validation error for invalid email

Description: Verify lead form company name field
Test_Steps: 1. Locate lead capture form 2. Fill company name 3. Verify field accepts input
Expected_Result: Field should accept company name input correctly

Description: Verify lead form email field and validation
Test_Steps: 1. Fill email field 2. Verify validation 3. Try invalid email
Expected_Result: Should validate email format correctly

Description: Verify lead form business type dropdown
Test_Steps: 1. Click business type dropdown 2. Select option 3. Verify selection
Expected_Result: Dropdown should show all options and allow selection

Description: Verify lead form submission
Test_Steps: 1. Fill all lead form fields 2. Click submit 3. Verify confirmation
Expected_Result: Should submit successfully and show confirmation message

Description: Verify website displays correctly on iPhone 12
Test_Steps: 1. Set viewport to 390x844 2. Test all pages 3. Verify no overlapping elements
Expected_Result: All pages should display correctly without overlapping content

Description: Verify website displays correctly on iPad
Test_Steps: 1. Set viewport to 768x1024 2. Test all pages 3. Verify layout adapts
Expected_Result: Tablet layout should adapt properly with readable fonts

Description: Verify website displays correctly on desktop
Test_Steps: 1. Set viewport to 1920x1080 2. Test all pages 3. Verify optimal layout
Expected_Result: Desktop layout should be clean and well-organized

Description: Verify mobile hamburger menu works
Test_Steps: 1. Open on mobile 2. Click hamburger menu 3. Verify menu opens
Expected_Result: Hamburger menu should open and show all navigation items

Description: Verify form fields are accessible on mobile
Test_Steps: 1. Open form on mobile 2. Try to fill fields 3. Verify keyboard shows
Expected_Result: Form fields should be accessible with proper sizing

Description: Verify images load optimized on mobile
Test_Steps: 1. Open page on mobile 2. Check image sizes 3. Verify fast loading
Expected_Result: Images should load quickly and be optimized for mobile

Description: Verify buttons are properly sized for touch
Test_Steps: 1. Check button sizes on mobile 2. Verify minimum 44x44px 3. Test clicking
Expected_Result: All buttons should be at least 44x44px for proper touch targets

Description: Verify homepage loads within 3 seconds
Test_Steps: 1. Measure page load time 2. Verify <3 seconds 3. Check all resources load
Expected_Result: Page should fully load within 3 seconds

Description: Verify services page loads within 4 seconds
Test_Steps: 1. Measure services page load time 2. Verify <4 seconds 3. Check resource loading
Expected_Result: Services page should load within 4 seconds

Description: Verify images are optimized and compressed
Test_Steps: 1. Check image file sizes 2. Verify compression 3. Check format
Expected_Result: Images should be optimized WebP or compressed JPG

Description: Verify CSS and JS files are minified
Test_Steps: 1. Check file sizes 2. Verify minification 3. Check load time
Expected_Result: CSS and JS should be minified to reduce file size

Description: Verify footer is visible and properly formatted
Test_Steps: 1. Scroll to footer 2. Verify all content visible 3. Check formatting
Expected_Result: Footer should be visible with all content properly formatted

Description: Verify all footer links are working
Test_Steps: 1. Check all footer links 2. Click each link 3. Verify navigation
Expected_Result: All footer links should navigate to correct pages

Description: Verify social media links in footer
Test_Steps: 1. Locate social media icons 2. Click each link 3. Verify opens in new tab
Expected_Result: Social media links should open profiles in new tabs

Description: Verify copyright and legal info in footer
Test_Steps: 1. Check copyright text 2. Verify privacy link 3. Verify terms link
Expected_Result: Copyright info and legal links should be present and working
